title: 반도체 산업, 4분기 실적 호조 전망
summary: 국내 반도체 기업들이 AI 반도체 수요 증가로 4분기 실적 호조을 예상했습니다.
content: Domestic semiconductor companies forecast strong Q4 performance. AI chip demand continues to drive growth. Memory market prices have shown recent recovery. Foundry capacity utilization reached near maximum levels. Major clients have placed additional orders. Export data supports positive outlook. Industry inventory levels remain healthy. New product launches are scheduled for next quarter. Competition in advanced node process is intensifying. R&D investments are yielding technological breakthroughs. Profit margins are expected to improve significantly.
